trans-unit.source: Open the Mozilla VPN app on your preferred device
trans-unit.note: Bullet ordered list item in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Vierç la aplicazion Mozilla VPN sul to dispositîf preferît

trans-unit.note: Bullet ordered list item in a composer block

trans-unit.source: Voila! Your device has been automatically added to your VPN list of connected devices
trans-unit.note: Bullet ordered list item in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Fat! Il to dispositîf al è stât zontât in automatic ae liste dai dispositîfs conetûts ae VPN

trans-unit.source: Open Mozilla VPN in your chosen desktop or mobile device
trans-unit.note: Bullet ordered list item in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Vierç Mozilla VPN sul dispositîf di scritori o mobil desiderât

trans-unit.source: Go to Settings and select “My devices”
trans-unit.note: Bullet ordered list item in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Va tes Impostazions e selezione “I miei dispositîfs”

trans-unit.source: Select the “Trash” icon next to the device you want to remove from your list of connected devices
trans-unit.note: Bullet ordered list item in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Selezione la icone “Scovacere” dongje dal dispositîf che tu desideris gjavâ de liste dai dispositîfs conetûts

trans-unit.source: Follow this quick and simple 3 step guide to add and remove all of your devices easily.
trans-unit.target: Va daûr di cheste rapide e semplice vuide in 3 passaçs che e spieghe cemût zontâ e gjavâ ducj i tiei dispositîfs cun facilitât.

trans-unit.source: How do I add and remove devices?
trans-unit.target: Cemût zontio e gjavio i dispositîfs?
